title: Refund Bank Account Not Pre-Validated
failure_message: The taxpayer is due a refund of ₹{refund_amount} but no pre-validated bank account has been linked to the PAN on the IT Portal.
remediation: Log in to the IT Portal (incometax.gov.in) and pre-validate the bank account under 'My Profile > Bank Account'. IFSC and account number must match. Refunds are processed only to pre-validated accounts.
notes: Even if a bank account is mentioned in the return, refunds only go to pre-validated accounts. This must be checked before filing.
